from typing import TypedDict

class ConfigData(TypedDict, total=False):
    debug: bool
    log_level: str
    max_connections: int
    secret_key: str

class ItemPayload(TypedDict, total=False):
    name: str
    quantity: int
    price: float
    discount: float

def get_debug_mode(config: ConfigData) -> bool:
    if "debug" not in config:
        return False
    return config["debug"]

def get_secret(config: ConfigData) -> str | None:
    return config.get("secret_key")

def calculate_total(item: ItemPayload) -> float:
    quantity = item.get("quantity", 0)
    price = item.get("price", 0.0)
    base = quantity * price
    discount = item.get("discount", 0.0)
    return base * (1 - discount)

def get_log_level(config: ConfigData) -> str:
    return config.get("log_level", "INFO")
